name: Enchilada Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups tomato sauce or 1 large can + 4 cups water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the tomato sauce (or canned tomatoes and water), garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and cornstarch.
2. Stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens, about 7 minutes.
